_comment: Stable terrain IDs and PixelLab pair stems per biome slug. IDs must match TileSetService / LocalMapGenerator.

pairs._note: art swap: sandy lower=ground, cracked upper=debris (PixelLab upper looked like lava)

prompts.ground: sparse scorched dry grass clumps on hard packed earth, flat square top-down seamless tileable texture, no isometric, no diamond, no rhombus edges
prompts.debris: sandy gravel surface with scattered pebbles and dust, flat square top-down seamless tileable path, no isometric, no diamond
prompts.vegetation: dry yellow scrub and tufts on hard ground, flat square top-down seamless, no isometric diamond
prompts.blocked: dark scorched rock and stone shelf, flat square top-down seamless, no isometric diamond
prompts.water: shallow muddy oil-slick puddle surface, flat square top-down seamless, no isometric diamond
